news.title:
OMCs like BPCL, HPCL, and IOC face Q4 FY26 profit pressures due to higher fuel losses and LPG under-recoveries, despite strong GRMs.
Analysts favor BPCL for risk-reward, IOC for stability, and upgraded HPCL for operational gains and project completions.
news.summary:
OMCs like BPCL, HPCL, and IOC face Q4 FY26 profit pressures due to higher fuel losses and LPG under-recoveries, despite strong GRMs.
Analysts favor BPCL for risk-reward, IOC for stability, and upgraded HPCL for operational gains and project completions.

news.title:
OMC stocks like HPCL, BPCL, and IOCL dropped up to 6% as crude surged past $105/barrel due to Hormuz blockade fears.
Sensex plunged over 1,000 points, Nifty fell below 23,750 as geopolitical tensions escalated, pressuring energy sector stocks.
news.summary:
OMC stocks like HPCL, BPCL, and IOCL dropped up to 6% as crude surged past $105/barrel due to Hormuz blockade fears.
Sensex plunged over 1,000 points, Nifty fell below 23,750 as geopolitical tensions escalated, pressuring energy sector stocks.

news.title:
Govt hiked windfall tax on diesel and ATF exports, impacting IOC, BPCL, HPCL, and Reliance shares.
Delhi's draft EV policy may boost Ather, Ola, TVS, Bajaj Auto, Hero MotoCorp as it mandates EV adoption by 2028.
news.summary:
Govt hiked windfall tax on diesel and ATF exports, impacting IOC, BPCL, HPCL, and Reliance shares.
Delhi's draft EV policy may boost Ather, Ola, TVS, Bajaj Auto, Hero MotoCorp as it mandates EV adoption by 2028.

news.title:
Diesel export tax hike may align prices between state OMCs and private firms.
OMCs like IOCL, BPCL, HPCL procure diesel from private refiners like RIL, Nayara.
news.summary:
Diesel export tax hike may align prices between state OMCs and private firms.
OMCs like IOCL, BPCL, HPCL procure diesel from private refiners like RIL, Nayara.

news.title:
Sanjay Khanna appointed Chairman, MD of Bharat Petroleum Corp. (BPCL), effective April 9, 2026, till May 31, 2029.
Khanna spearheaded BPCL's Rs 75,000 crore investment plans including Rs 50,000 crore Bina project, boosting growth.
news.summary:
Sanjay Khanna appointed Chairman, MD of Bharat Petroleum Corp. (BPCL), effective April 9, 2026, till May 31, 2029.
Khanna spearheaded BPCL's Rs 75,000 crore investment plans including Rs 50,000 crore Bina project, boosting growth.

news.title:
NGT dismisses BPCL's appeal against Rs 1 crore fine for not installing vapour recovery system.
VRS helps prevent release of harmful organic compounds from petroleum products.
news.summary:
NGT dismisses BPCL's appeal against Rs 1 crore fine for not installing vapour recovery system.
VRS helps prevent release of harmful organic compounds from petroleum products.

news.title:
Govt ensures uninterrupted pharma production amid West Asia crisis by stepping up feedstock supplies.
BPCL supplies propylene; Assam Petrochemicals and GNFC address methanol needs; customs duty waived on 40 products.
news.summary:
Govt ensures uninterrupted pharma production amid West Asia crisis by stepping up feedstock supplies.
BPCL supplies propylene; Assam Petrochemicals and GNFC address methanol needs; customs duty waived on 40 products.

news.title: BPCL appoints Sanjay Khanna as Chairman and Managing Director.
news.summary: BPCL appoints Sanjay Khanna as Chairman and Managing Director.

news.title: BPCL appoints Sanjay Khanna as Chairman and MD, marking leadership change.
news.summary: BPCL appoints Sanjay Khanna as Chairman and MD, marking leadership change.

news.title:
Brokerages highlight stock picks like BPCL, GAIL, Tata Steel, SBI Life, and Ambuja Cement across energy, cement, and insurance sectors.
Analysts favor 360One, Nuvama Wealth, Max Healthcare, and domestic cyclicals, citing resilience, market recovery potential, and strategic positioning.
news.summary:
Brokerages highlight stock picks like BPCL, GAIL, Tata Steel, SBI Life, and Ambuja Cement across energy, cement, and insurance sectors.
Analysts favor 360One, Nuvama Wealth, Max Healthcare, and domestic cyclicals, citing resilience, market recovery potential, and strategic positioning.

news.title:
Crude prices drop $15 after Iran-US ceasefire, easing fuel price pressures. OMCs' diesel losses shrink from ₹52 to ₹22/litre.
Reliance, IOCL, BPCL, HPCL benefit from lower crude costs, boosting margins. LPG losses drop 30%, easing subsidy concerns.
news.summary:
Crude prices drop $15 after Iran-US ceasefire, easing fuel price pressures. OMCs' diesel losses shrink from ₹52 to ₹22/litre.
Reliance, IOCL, BPCL, HPCL benefit from lower crude costs, boosting margins. LPG losses drop 30%, easing subsidy concerns.

news.title:
IOC, BPCL, and HPCL surged 8.2%-9% as crude prices tanked 13%.
Declining crude prices boost refiners' margins, easing inflation concerns.
news.summary:
IOC, BPCL, and HPCL surged 8.2%-9% as crude prices tanked 13%.
Declining crude prices boost refiners' margins, easing inflation concerns.

news.title:
BPCL surged nearly 8% as Brent crude fell over 13% post US-Iran ceasefire.
Oil marketing companies also saw significant gains in response to the crude drop.
news.summary:
BPCL surged nearly 8% as Brent crude fell over 13% post US-Iran ceasefire.
Oil marketing companies also saw significant gains in response to the crude drop.

news.title:
IOC, BPCL, and HPCL incurred a ₹6/litre loss on diesel in Q4 FY23.
This contrasts with a ₹5.5/litre profit in the same period last year.
news.summary:
IOC, BPCL, and HPCL incurred a ₹6/litre loss on diesel in Q4 FY23.
This contrasts with a ₹5.5/litre profit in the same period last year.

news.title:
IOC and BPCL defer refinery maintenance to ensure fuel supply amid Hormuz disruption.
India ramps up LPG production by 40%, meeting 60% of daily demand with imports secured.
news.summary:
IOC and BPCL defer refinery maintenance to ensure fuel supply amid Hormuz disruption.
India ramps up LPG production by 40%, meeting 60% of daily demand with imports secured.

news.title:
OMCs to pay discounted rates to refiners for petrol, diesel, ATF, and kerosene.
Move aims to limit losses from self-imposed freeze on retail fuel prices.
news.summary:
OMCs to pay discounted rates to refiners for petrol, diesel, ATF, and kerosene.
Move aims to limit losses from self-imposed freeze on retail fuel prices.

news.title:
OMCs set new rates for petroleum goods, discounts up to ₹60/litre below import costs from March 16.
Independent refiners like MRPL, CPCL, and HMEL likely to face significant impact from revised pricing.
news.summary:
OMCs set new rates for petroleum goods, discounts up to ₹60/litre below import costs from March 16.
Independent refiners like MRPL, CPCL, and HMEL likely to face significant impact from revised pricing.

news.title:
Govt to release ₹17,500 crore compensation to OMCs on LPG under-recoveries in FY27.
Amount will be disbursed in 7 equal tranches by March 2027 to IOC, HPCL, and BPCL.
news.summary:
Govt to release ₹17,500 crore compensation to OMCs on LPG under-recoveries in FY27.
Amount will be disbursed in 7 equal tranches by March 2027 to IOC, HPCL, and BPCL.

news.title:
OMCs like IOC, HPCL, and BPCL raise concerns over flex fuels' viability due to pricing issues.
They highlight minimal price difference between flex fuel and E20, despite lower calorific value impacting mileage.
news.summary:
OMCs like IOC, HPCL, and BPCL raise concerns over flex fuels' viability due to pricing issues.
They highlight minimal price difference between flex fuel and E20, despite lower calorific value impacting mileage.

news.title:
Indian Oil, HPCL, and BPCL assured no disruption in LPG, petrol, and diesel supplies.
HPCL delivered record 14.1L LPG cylinders; BPCL emphasized steady fuel supply amid Gulf conflict concerns.
news.summary:
Indian Oil, HPCL, and BPCL assured no disruption in LPG, petrol, and diesel supplies.
